description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:10.15.3 Docker image. Add a pages job (which runs in the deploy stage for GitLab Pages) that caches the node_modules directory with cache key "project" and only runs on the master branch. The job's script should execute "npm install hexo-cli -g", then conditionally run "npm install" if a package.json file exists, and finally run "hexo generate". Publish the generated site by defining an artifact that includes the "public/" directory.
